description: bl-8a9a added the state_branch config field; tracker_address::resolve folds it into Address.branch and state_repo::ensure materializes that branch name in .balls/state-repo. But git_state::STATE_BRANCH and every claim/review/close/sync push+fetch path hardcode 'balls/tasks'. A non-default state_branch therefore materializes a mismatched local branch while all state-branch traffic still targets balls/tasks — a half-wired feature, and no SS16 conformance test exercises a non-default value. SPEC §5 says state_branch 'lets one tracker host several projects on distinct branches'. Decide and act: if full plumbing is in intent, fix it and add a conformance test for a non-default branch; if it is deferred, make a non-default state_branch hard-error with a clear message rather than silently half-working. A field that looks supported but isn't is worse than an honest 'not yet'.
title: Verify or gate state_branch — it materializes but push/sync hardcode balls/tasks
